subcodes.first_line: In this day, innumerable treasures of divine knowledge have been manifested from the treasury of sciences of the Lord of all beings. Say: O ye servants of the Most Glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز کنوز معارف لاتحصی از خزانه علوم مولی الوری ظاهر بگو ای عباد حق جل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment
